description: Tracks a dataset registered with GBIF via the Registry API. Links a PDS organization to its GBIF dataset UUID, installation, and archive blob.

main.description: A GBIF dataset registration record linking a PDS organization to its GBIF dataset UUID, installation, and archive blob.

organizationRef.description: AT-URI of the organization info record this dataset belongs to

gbifDatasetKey.description: GBIF dataset UUID returned by POST /dataset

gbifInstallationKey.description: GBIF installation UUID used when creating the dataset

gbifEndpointKey.description: GBIF endpoint integer key returned by POST /dataset/{key}/endpoint

archiveBlobCid.description: CID of the most recently uploaded DwC-A blob

lastPublishedAt.description: When the archive was last published to GBIF

lastCrawlFinishReason.description: Result of last GBIF crawl (NORMAL, ABORT, etc.)

createdAt.description: Timestamp of record creation in the ATProto PDS
